title: Polycell PLCMPPR1KGS Multi-Purpose Polyfilla Ready Mixed, 1 Kg, White & Harris Seriously Good Continental Filling Knives 4 Pack 102064328
features: Product 1: Polycell Polyfilla Multi-Purpose Ready Mixed Filler Tub 1kg
Product 1: Will not shrink or crack
Product 2: These Seriously Good filling knives have flexible stainless steel blades for filling small holes cracks and detailed areas
Product 2: This 4 pack contains a variety of sizes suitable for repairing small areas of damage
Product 2: For use with general purpose filler fine surface filler and wood filler
description: From the manufacturer Polycell Multi Purpose Polyfilla Ready Mixed Multi-Purpose Polyfilla is ready mixed for a smooth, creamy consistency. Special binders give guaranteed adhesion and a fill which will not shrink or crack. Features The versatile filler. Available in original powder or ready mixed. Drillable. Adhesion, will not shrink or crack. How to Apply Ensure surface and crack are dry and free from loose material Touch in nails and screw heads with oil based paint Stir to a creamy consistency Press into crack with a filling knife, smoothing off with a wet knife For deeper repairs, above 10mm, build up in layers allowing to dry between applications. If necessary, sand down when fully dried To stop product drying out when storing, replace membrane and lid Wash tools in warm water. Choosing The Right Harris Product For Your Decorating Task Has Never Been Easier At Harris, our mission is to share our knowledge to give you the confidence you need to succeed in your decorating and painting projects. That means listening, learning, creating, improving and innovating our painting and decorating tools to make your product choice easier and more enjoyable. We've specially developed our new painting and decorating product range for DIY decorators. The success of Harris products has always been down to how we continually develop our painting and decorating tools to meet your needs, so we’ve grouped, and colour coded our products by traditional DIY tasks. Our customers are always at the heart of everything we do! Harris Seriously Good Continental Filling Knives 4 Pack Contents 1 x 2in (50mm) 1 x 3in (75mm) 1 x 4in (100mm) 1 x 5in (125mm) For Staining or Varnishing those Smaller woodwork areas This Seriously Good Continental Filling Knives pack contains all the filling knives you need for different size filling jobs. The flexible stainless steel blades make it easy to fill different size holes and cracks For use with general purpose filler, fine surface filler and wood filler. Remove all filler from knives after use, wipe clean with a damp cloth then dry with a clean cloth Preparing a Project Team these filling knives up with Harris Seriously Good Sandpaper, Harris Seriously Good Masking Tape and Harris Seriously Good Cotton Rich Dust Sheet.
